ref: Jour: Physics in Medicine and Biology, Vol.60, p.931 (2015)
title: Production of medical isotopes from a thorium target irradiated by light charged particles up to 70 MeV

x4freetext: Production of medical isotopes from a thorium target
irradiated by light charged particles up to 70 MeV

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physics in Medicine and Biology, Vol.60, p.931 (2015)

x4freetext: monitor foils Ti (99.6 % pure), Ni (99.9% pure),
Cu (99.9% pure) with thicknesses of 10 or 20 um and
Al and Cu degrader foils (between 500 um to 1 mm thick)
The full width at half maximum values were
1.04 keV for the 122 keV (57Co ray) and 1.97 keV for
with a beam intensity between 100 and 150 nA for 30 min
